angles.angle: Privacy-first inventory: map what we have without touching contents
angles.notes: Emphasize metadata-only approach and protection of donor/client information.

angles.angle: Faster staff support: find files faster so programs run smoother
angles.notes: Highlights day-to-day benefits for program teams and operations.

angles.angle: Grant and audit readiness: prove stewardship of donor and client data
angles.notes: Positions inventory as proactive governance for funders and auditors.

angles.angle: Storage savings: remove duplicates and stale files to stretch our budget
angles.notes: Focus on reducing storage costs and clutter.

angles.angle: Digital spring cleaning: a friendly, time-boxed tidy-up together
angles.notes: Invite staff to participate without blame; opt-in culture.

angles.angle: Empower program teams: simple dashboards for your folders
angles.notes: Use the offline HTML report to browse by folder and see quick stats.

angles.angle: Risk reduction: flag risky file types and open shares using metadata only
angles.notes: Stay within metadata scope; avoid content scanning.
